sections.paragraph: as in Ch. and in the Talmud, to feed largely, to fatten cattle. (Prop., as appears to me, to stamp in, comp. the kindred בּוּס, hence to stuff, to cram, einpfropfen; comp. Gr. τρέφω pr. i.q. πήγνυμι.) Part. pass. Pro 15:17. Used of geese, 1 K. 5:3 . Hence are derived אֵבוּס, מַאֲבוּס.
